featureName: BUG-001: Home-lab readiness docs belong outside product repo

completedPhaseClaims.summary: Created planning-only bug packet for migrating home-lab-specific readiness docs out of Smackerel.

Confirmed design.md change plan: remove home-lab target content from product docs; add generic Pre-Apply Prerequisites + Connector Live-Stack Evidence Caveat to Deployment.md; preserve D-001 ownership correction. No design edits required.
Confirmed scopes.md DoD items map cleanly to test IDs T-DOC-001 through T-DOC-008 plus regression IDs T-DOC-R01..R03. Added Change Boundary sections per scope and Consumer Impact Sweep for Scope 2.

Spec-review pass before implementation: spec.md, design.md, scopes.md confirmed coherent. Five Gherkin scenarios (SCN-032-D01..D05) map to scoped DoD items + Test Plan rows. Approved for implement phase.

Replaced docs/Home_Lab_Deployment_Plan.md (153 lines of target-specific checklist) with a 60-line migration-pointer stub naming knb spec 003-smackerel-home-lab-adapter-readiness. Inserted two new generic sections in docs/Deployment.md (Generic Pre-Apply Prerequisites + Connector Live-Stack Evidence Caveat) between the existing top-of-file boundary statement and the existing artifacts section. No content removed from Deployment.md (existing CI / cosign / spec 044 / spec 047 / spec 048 / spec 049 sections were already generic).

Static-doc test surface (T-DOC-001..008): executed five grep commands per design.md §Test Design. All passed scenario-first: each grep is a red→green probe that would have failed before the bug edit and passes after. No runtime tests invoked because zero .go/.yml/.yaml/.py files modified (docs-only repair per change boundary).

Regression coverage: T-DOC-R01 / R02 / R03 documented in scopes.md Test Plan as scenario-first static-doc grep probes. The grep commands persist in report.md §Validation Evidence and can be re-run on demand to verify the migration and prerequisites stay in place.

Static-doc grep checks T-DOC-001..008 all pass: zero OPS-HOMELAB-1xx matches, all five product-required auth+postgres keys present in dotted YAML form, four 'live-stack' references including header, BUG-001 cited in Deployment.md preserving D-001 correction.

Verified docs/Home_Lab_Deployment_Plan.md reduced from 153 to 60 lines (migration-pointer stub only); D-001 correction preserved in both edited files. No content removed from Deployment.md — only insertions.

Chaos surface: docs-only bug; chaos-test substitutes per design.md are the static-doc grep red→green probes which would re-detect any rollback to obsolete content. Verified zero source files modified via git diff --name-only against expected file set.
No simplification opportunities: the migration-pointer stub is already minimal; the two new Deployment.md sections are non-redundant with existing content.
No runtime instability surface for a docs-only repair; product runtime byte-identical to pre-bug HEAD.

Security review: the new Pre-Apply Prerequisites section makes secret-injection requirements MORE explicit (Spec 044 OQ-8 + Spec 051 FR-051-004/005 cited by ID). No secrets, real hostnames, IPs, tailnet IDs, or operator-coupled values introduced. Pre-commit gitleaks/pii-scan verified clean.

Updated bug spec.md status to Resolved; rewrote report.md with execution evidence; added implementation acknowledgement to uservalidation.md; marked both scopes Done with per-DoD evidence; created scenario-manifest.json with 5 scenarios.

completedScopes: Scope 1: Remove or migrate Home_Lab_Deployment_Plan target details
Scope 2: Align Deployment.md with the corrected readiness model
